action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline with ConvNeXt-Tiny (10 epochs, mixup+label smoothing) achieved 74.84% test accuracy. Val acc peaked at epoch 5 then declined, indicating overfitting to noisy labels. Analysis: With ~40% label noise, standard training memorizes noisy labels after warmup. Need noise-aware training (DivideMix-style) that uses GMM to separate clean/noisy samples and applies different losses. Also need EMA for stable predictions and TTA for better inference. Decision: Implement DivideMix-style training with EMA, cosine LR schedule, and 25 epochs (5 warmup + 20 noise-aware).
